articles.author: Michelle L. Price, Jim Gomez
articles.title: Iran's demands over the Strait of Hormuz would set a dangerous precedent, Rubio warns Asian leaders - AP News
articles.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has warned Asian leaders that Iran's demand to control the Strait of Hormuz threatens the global economy and freedom of navigation. He was speaking Wednesday at an ASEAN meeting in the Philippine capital, Manila, with Southeast …
articles.content: MANILA, Philippines (AP) U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Asian leaders Wednesday that Irans demand to control and collect tolls in the Strait of Hormuz would threaten the worlds economy an… [+6132 chars]
